A.13.1.1 Network Controls.title: Firewall set to 0.0.0.0/0 allowing unrestricted access
A.13.1.1 Network Controls.remediation: Restrict the firewall to only allow access from trusted IP ranges. Implement proper network segmentation and monitoring.

A.9.2.3 Management of Secret Authenticat.title: Hardcoded sensitive credentials in code
A.9.2.3 Management of Secret Authenticat.remediation: Remove hardcoded credentials from the codebase. Use environment variables or secure vaults to manage sensitive information.

A.9.2.3 \u2013 Management of Privileged.title: Privilege escalation or admin role granted
A.9.2.3 \u2013 Management of Privileged.remediation: Revoke elevated privileges immediately, audit role change history, enforce least-privilege policy.

A.12.6.1 Management of Technical Vulnera.title: Request to skip security scan on emergency change
A.12.6.1 Management of Technical Vulnera.remediation: Ensure all changes undergo mandatory security scans, even in emergency situations. Implement automated security checks in the CI/CD pipeline.
